content-right-description1:
Overview

A block used for rocket navigation and central controll.
content-right-description2:
Usage

This block is needed for a rocket (the rocket won't assemble otherwise).

Info:
When assembled the computer will display Thrust max and cur, Mass and Weight.
On the right side you can see the current fuel level, as well as the fuel type and max fuel level.

Navigation:
By placing eather a planet Id chip or an linker in the top left slot you are able to fly to the linked location.

Storage:
In the bottom of the GUI, there is a list of all cargo holds and their contained item, you can take items out and into the slot via your mouse.
